text:
Bharate (バラーテ, Barāte) is one of the personal Royal Bodyguards of 7 th Prince Luzurus. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Bharate has beady eyes, prominent cheekbones, a bumpy nose, and long, thin, straight eyebrows. The hair at the top of his head is fair and short, while at the sides, he only sports three parallel lines of it. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 386 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On the ninth day of the voyage, Bharate is sitting at a table next to Famule when the rumbling aura from the neighboring 9 th Prince Halkenburg's Room 1009 returns. He jumps to his feet and moves to guard the door when the doorbell rings. After "Shikaku" shoots himself in the corridor and the aura disappears, Bharate looks around in confusion. 

On eleventh day of the voyage, Bharate is seen in Luzurus' master bedroom seated on a couch behind Luzurus, as 11 th Prince Fugetsu passes him a letter from the then-recently-deceased 10 th Prince Kacho. Hunter × Hunter - Chapter 402
